NetSparkleUpdater.​UI.​Avalonia.​UpdateAvailableWindow
NetSparkleUpdater.​UI.​Avalonia.​Controls.​BaseWindow
NetSparkleUpdater.​Interfaces.​IUpdateAvailable
NetSparkleUpdater.​UI.​Avalonia.​Interfaces.​IReleaseNotesDisplayer
NetSparkleUpdater.​UI.​Avalonia.​Interfaces.​IUserRespondedToUpdateCheck
public
NetSparkleUpdater.​UI.​Avalonia.​UpdateAvailableWindow

Interaction logic for UpdateAvailableWindow.xaml.  Window that shows the list of available updates to the user

Variables
_dataContext
private UpdateAvailableWindowViewModel? _dataContext
_releaseNotesRow
private RowDefinition? _releaseNotesRow
_htmlLabelContainer
private ScrollViewer? _htmlLabelContainer
_htmlLabel
private HtmlLabel? _htmlLabel
_wasResponseSent
private bool _wasResponseSent
Functions
UpdateAvailableWindow
public UpdateAvailableWindow()

Initialize the available update window with no initial date context (and thus no initial information on downloadable releases to show to the user)

UpdateAvailableWindow
public UpdateAvailableWindow(
UpdateAvailableWindowViewModel 
viewModel,
Bitmap? 
iconBitmap
)

Initialize the available update window with the given view model, which contains the information on the updates that are available to the end user

Parameters
viewModel
UpdateAvailableWindowViewModel

View model with info on the updates that are available to the user

iconBitmap
Bitmap?

Bitmap to use for the app's logo/graphic

InitViews
private void InitViews()
ChangeMainGridBackgroundColor
public void ChangeMainGridBackgroundColor(
IBrush 
solidColorBrush
)

Change the main grid's background color. Use new SolidColorBrush(Colors.Transparent) or null to clear.

solidColorBrush

get

The item that the user is being asked about updating to

UserResponded
public event UserRespondedToUpdate? UserResponded

An event that informs its listeners how the user responded to the software update request

UserRespondedToUpdateCheck
public void UserRespondedToUpdateCheck(
UpdateAvailableResult 
response
)

The user responded to the update check with a given response

Parameter
response
UpdateAvailableResult

How the user responded to the update (e.g. install the update, remind me later)

string 
htmlNotes
)

Show the HTML release notes to the user via the UI dispatcher

htmlNotes
string

The HTML notes to show to the end user
